summary_one_line: Input must encode a parametric tone-curve Type field equal to 2 so the switch dispatches to case 2.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An ICC parametric curve whose stored Type selector decodes to the integer 2, so the switch(Type) at line 344 dispatches to case 2 (line 380). The blocker is the true side of the case-2 dispatch; the input must carry a parametricCurveType field exactly equal to 2 somewhere in the parsed profile bytes.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seeds reach case 2 at runtime (line 380 fires T=602000 in W vs T=0 in L) and the whole case-2 body (lines 380-404) is marked [W] winner-resolving-only, with the branch hit 304270/391450 times by the winners. The cmplog/vpc winners can place the exact byte value 2 into the Type field via I2SRandReplace because the switch(Type) comparison logs the constant operand 2.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser seeds never take case 2: line 380 shows T=0 F=204000 for L, and the entire case-2 body is not marked [L]. naive/value_profile have no I2S substitution to plant the discriminant integer 2 into the Type field, so they stay blocked on this side for the full 24h (avg duration blocked loser=24.00h).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog and value_profile_cmplog add I2SRandReplace, which reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer for the switch(Type) comparison, finds where the current Type bytes appear in the input, and substitutes the logged constant operand (2) at those offsets, satisfying case 2 directly. naive and value_profile lack I2SRandReplace and must hit the exact discriminant by chance, which does not happen in 24h.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of the switch arm case 2 inside DefaultEvalParametricFn, selected by the Type discriminant.
The case-2 dispatch is governed by switch(Type).
Winners take case 2 while losers never do, per per-role branch divergence.
The entire case-2 body is exclusively winner-resolving coverage.
Winners hit the branch hundreds of thousands of times; losers zero.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=304270  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: Losers stay blocked the full campaign duration.
cmplog/vpc add I2SRandReplace which substitutes a logged CMP operand at matching input offsets, enabling the discriminant value.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2110 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 2387be4af54319dc`. The ancestor chain has 7 levels and the trailing I2S-floor signal reports 2 dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depths 5 and 6, characteristic of unwrapped I2SRandReplace finds in cmplog/vpc under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with switch(Type) on an input-derived integer where cmplog/vpc fail to reach case 2 while naive reaches it at the same rate, i.e. no I2S advantage for hitting an exact switch discriminant.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact input offset encoding the Type discriminant is not isolated in the BYTE DIFF (offsets show profile-tag differences like RGB/Lab/XYZ, not a clearly distinguishable Type=2 field), so the precise substituted offset is inferred from source, not directly observed.
